trivia_bullets.text: Heartfire Immolator is a new card from Core Set 2021 (July 3, 2020), reprinted in Foundations (November 2024). The card was previewed in a Wizards article focused on Fiery Emancipation (the 'triple damage' enchantment) — framed as the combo piece: pump it with prowess, then sacrifice it with Fiery Emancipation out for triple its power in damage (the preview pitched dealing 21 damage from a 7-power Immolator).
sources: Wizards.com: Triple Your Pleasure Triple Your Fun, magic.wizards.com, 2020-06-10

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text: '"I'd rather go out in a blaze of glory than fade away and be forgotten."' Unnamed speaker — the voice belongs to the figure themselves. The mechanic literalizes the quote: the immolator converts their accumulated prowess-pumped power into one final damage burst via sacrifice.

Donato Giancola has created approximately 166 MTG illustrations since his 1996 debut in Mirage, across 58 sets. He is a multi-award winning illustrator: Hamilton King Award (Society of Illustrators), 23 Chesley Awards, three Artist Hugo Awards. Hipsters of the Coast described him as having 'the quality that upon meeting, you feel like you're connecting with an old friend.' The Heartfire Immolator wide-frame back-to-viewer composition is consistent with his tradition of figures dwarfed by cosmic scale.
sources: Hipsters of the Coast: Donato Giancola Land Panorama, 2018-12

trivia_bullets.text: Rules note confirmed in Scryfall rulings: opponents cannot take actions between activating the sacrifice ability and the sacrifice itself — they cannot try to lower the Immolator's power after the ability goes on the stack. Damage output is locked at activation time.

related_cards.name: Fiery Emancipation
related_cards.note: The card previewed alongside Heartfire; tripling its sacrifice damage is the headline synergy from the Wizards preview article

related_cards.name: Goblin Arsonist
related_cards.note: Cited in the same Wizards article as the simpler version of the 'sacrifice for damage' design pattern

related_cards.name: Monastery Swiftspear
related_cards.note: Red prowess creature for comparison; Heartfire is the version designed to turn prowess-pumping into lethal removal via sacrifice
